name: @stone-js/blog-starters
description: Opt-in starter templates that ship with the Stone.js blog recipes. Kept separate from the default starters so `npm create @stone-js` stays uncluttered; request them with `--starters @stone-js/blog-starters`.
author: Mr. Stone <evensstone@gmail.com>

starters.title: Realtime chat
starters.description: Channels, presence and broadcast over WebSockets with @stone-js/realtime.

starters.title: Multi-tenant (subdomain routing)
starters.description: Capture the tenant from the subdomain and scope every request to it, with the universal router.

starters.title: Isomorphic validation
starters.description: One schema, enforced at the API boundary (422) and reusable on the frontend form, with @stone-js/validation + Zod.

starters.title: Stateless auth
starters.description: Verify a JWT at the boundary and guard routes with requireAuth/requireScopes, no session store, with @stone-js/auth.

starters.title: Agent superpowers (MCP dev)
starters.description: Give your coding agent superpowers with `stone mcp` (@stone-js/mcp-dev): serve the framework's knowledge and this app's own structure as tools.

starters.title: OpenAPI contract from your schemas
starters.description: Generate a public OpenAPI document from the Zod schemas you already validate with, and serve it with Swagger UI.

starters.title: Direct-to-cloud uploads
starters.description: Direct-to-cloud file uploads with short-lived signed URLs, the bytes never touch your function, with @stone-js/cloud-file.
